allow: Bash(cd /usr/local/lib/argbash; grep -rln "ARG_USE_PROGRAM\\|check_prog\\|_check_prog" *.m4 | head; echo "=== definition ==="; grep -rn -A15 "define\(\\[ARG_USE_PROGRAM\\]\\|ARG_USE_PROGRAM\\]," *.m4 | head -60)

Bash(cd /workspace/compusib && grep -rl 'bootstrap-claude-sync' --include='*.sh' --include='*' . 2>/dev/null | grep -v '\\.git/' | head; echo "---"; find . -name 'bootstrap-claude-sync*' 2>/dev/null | grep -v '\\.git/')
Bash(gh issue create --title 'claude feature: configure compusib marketplace declaratively at postStart \(local-mount-aware\), drop SessionStart hook' --body ' *)
Bash(git -c color.ui=never diff -- src/claude/scripts/bootstrap-claude-sync src/claude/install.sh src/claude/devcontainer-feature.json)
